description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on a macOS runner using the macos-15-xcode-16 Docker image and the saas-macos-large-m2pro tag. Define a hidden job named .installation:mac-os-job (no explicit stage) that runs a before_script installing make and moreutils via brew, sets GDK_DIR, MISE_FETCH_REMOTE_VERSIONS_TIMEOUT and MISE_HTTP_TIMEOUT variables, has an empty needs list, extends the .rules:novel rule, and after the job finishes tails the last 100 lines of gdk-install.log and stores gdk-install.log as an artifact that expires after 2 days and is always uploaded. Also define a hidden job named .verification:mac-os-job that runs an after_script moving all *.log files from ${GDK_DIR}/gitlab/log/ to a gitlab_log/ directory and moving the entire ${GDK_DIR}/log/ directory to a gdk_log/ directory.
